title: gladiolus papilionaceus
intro: Gladiolus papilionaceus, also known as the sword lily or butterfly iris, is a perennial plant species native to South Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues, due to its flavonoid and terpenoid content. The leaves and flowers of Gladiolus papilionaceus can be used to make herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
